$description: Patch recipe for Dying Light: Bad Blood client. Applied by apply_patches.py against a user's legitimately-owned vanilla install.

engine_x64_rwdi.dll.comment: Chrome Engine 6 main DLL. Original Techland binary, never redistributed.

byte_patches.description: Skips EAC GameClient_Initialize gate. Without this patch the engine shows 'Start the game using BadBloodGameLauncher.exe' and exits.
Forces CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER = 0. Allows self-signed certificates on the emulated server. Original instruction: SETNZ R8B (4 bytes). Patched to: XOR R8D,R8D ; NOP.
Forces CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST = 0. Allows hostname mismatch in cert. Same instruction swap as VERIFYPEER.
Forces the HTTP transport gate flag at [object+0x80] to 1. Without this the auth response is parsed but never delivered to the game (NULL pointer at [object+0x80]).

NOPs the rpacz filename whitelist check, allowing the engine to load custom .rpacz patches with any name. Required for custom addon skins. Patch length is approximate — see verify_patches.py for exact verification.

string_patches.description: Replaces the hardcoded Techland PLS hostname with the user's emulated server hostname. Replacement MUST be exactly 12 ASCII characters to preserve binary alignment. Choose your hostname accordingly (e.g. pls.foo123.it = 12 chars).

BadBloodGame.exe.comment: Main game executable. Must be Steamless-unpacked BEFORE running this patcher.
BadBloodGame.exe.prerequisite: Run Steamless v3.1+ on your Steam-installed BadBloodGame.exe first. The unpacked file is ~975KB (vs ~1.15MB packed). See docs/setup-game.md.

string_patches.description: Some strings of pls.dlbb.com may also appear in the EXE. Same 12-char constraint.

hosts_entry.comment: The user's hosts file should redirect the original Techland hostname (still embedded in some game code paths) to localhost so stunnel can intercept HTTPS.
